Notice Of Motion And Motion For Continuance Of Action By Successor Of Interest Of Plaintiff'S Estate; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Delcaration Of Michele Smith In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF LOIS SMITH's Motion For Continuance Of Action By Successor Of Interest Of Plaintiff'S Estate.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed "motion for continuance of action by successor of interest" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
